title: oenothera hartwegii var. fendleri
intro: Oenothera hartwegii var. fendleri, also known as the Hartweg's evening primrose, is a perennial flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Oenothera hartwegii var. fendleri include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and supporting cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, with herbal preparations often used to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and other minor ailments.
